docs(review): 2026-04-28 架构 review plan 落地 + AGENTS.md FREEZE 段

ADR sprint (ADR-0014 全 Phase → Phase 6 EventBus → ADR-0015/0016 → loop 升级)
→ 接口/数据结构 review + 模块拆分 + 规范扫描（按 crate 切片可并行）→ findings 整合。
退出标准 5 项全勾才解冻；freeze 期不接受新 ADR / public type 变更 / 新模块。
预计 ~2026-05-08 解冻。

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Niu Zhihong <zhihong@nzhnb.com>

docs(adr-0014): Phase 3b / 4 / 5 plan 全部写完，ADR-0014 路线图落地

三个 plan 互相独立、可乱序实施，覆盖 ADR-0014 spec 第九章剩余全部范围 +
第十一章 5 项 spec-pending 决策的拍板理由。

- Phase 3b（1183 行 / 9 task）：补完 Phase 3 spec 范围内 deferred 的 2 项——
  `lookup` 节点（pure-form 配置驱动表查找，3 标量 key stringify + default
  fallback）+ 混合输入 payload 合并语义正式拍板（Exec Object → Data 键插入；
  Exec 标量/数组 → 包装到 "in" 键；Data 键冲突时覆盖 Exec）+ 部署期校验
  Data 输入 pin id ≠ "in"。跨语言 fixture mixed_input_merge.jsonc 6 case 穷尽。

- Phase 4（1077 行 / 10 task）：缓存生命周期与用例 4 旁路 fan-out。
  PinDefinition 加 empty_policy（BlockUntilReady 默认 / DefaultValue / Skip）+
  ttl_ms + block_timeout_ms。OutputCache 加 Arc<Notify> 唤醒等待者。
  EngineError::DataPinPullTimeout 覆盖等不到值场景。PureMemo per-trace 输入哈希
  记忆。集成测试覆盖 BlockUntilReady 超时 / TTL 过期 / DefaultValue 立即 /
  fan-out 上游单调用 / PURE memo 命中五场景。spec 决策 1 拍板 BlockUntilReady、
  决策 2 拍板引入 TTL。

- Phase 5（779 行 / 8 task）：视觉打磨 + AI prompt PinKind 感知，标 ADR 完结。
  节点头部色按 capability 自动着色（trigger 红 / branching 蓝 / pure 绿 /
  默认灰蓝）+ CSS 变量主题（theme.css）+ light/dark ThemeToggle。引脚 tooltip
  行序重组（求值语义→数据形状→描述→空槽策略→TTL）+ 中文标签函数。minimap
  同步节点头色。AI prompt builder 在节点 inline 描述里携带 PinKind / 空槽策略 /
  TTL。spec 决策 3/4/5 全部回写，ADR-0014 完结边界明确（后续 polish 作为
  独立 plan，不再排进 ADR-0014 phase 编号）。

实施前置：Phase 3 必须已落地（pull 路径 + is_pure_form + crates/nodes-pure/）；
Phase 3b / 4 / 5 之间无强依赖，建议 3 → 3b → 4 → 5 顺序铺开 spec 用例覆盖度。

Signed-off-by: Niu Zhihong <zhihong@nzhnb.com>

docs(adr-0014): Phase 3 plan 落地 + AGENTS.md 同步本地 memory 非派生事实

Phase 3 plan：`docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-28-adr-0014-phase-3-pure-nodes.md`
（14 task，~14 commits 预期）。范围：新 crate `crates/nodes-pure/` 容纳零协议
依赖纯计算节点；c2f / minutesSince 仅声明 Data 引脚 + 部署期跳过 spawn；
Runner 首次激活 pull 路径（`src/graph/pull.rs`，含 pure-form 上游递归求值
+ 非 pure-form 上游读 OutputCache 槽）；前端 `isPureForm` helper + 节点 DOM
`data-pure-form` attribute + 绿头/圆角胶囊视觉（UE5 Blueprint Pure Node 风格）；
跨语言 fixture `pure_form_matrix.jsonc` 4 配对穷尽 Rust + Vitest 共享。
明确 out-of-scope：lookup 节点 / 4 处 PinKind ↔ 子图交叉点 / formatJson 混合
输入 payload 合并语义 / Phase 4 缓存策略 / 节点头部色按 capability 着色 /
AI prompt 携带 pure-form 信息——各自后续独立 plan。

AGENTS.md 同步本地 memory 中"非派生"约定（跨机器可继续工作）：
- `### Memory System` 索引补齐 2 个新 memory 文件并新增"跨机器协作"段，
  显式声明 AGENTS.md 是真值源、memory 仅 point-in-time 副本
- 新增 `### 测试基建注意事项`（在 Testing 章节）：
  - Vitest navigator polyfill 删除守护（`web/vitest.setup.ts`，FlowGram SDK
    模块加载期硬依赖 `navigator.userAgent` / `language`）
  - E2E Playwright 跑在 Chromium 而非 Tauri webview（`hasTauriRuntime() = false`，
    IPC 不可用，断言"wiring presence"而非 IPC 真值）
- ADR-0014 状态行 + ADR Execution Order #8 加 Phase 3 plan 路径 + 待执行标记

未搬入的 memory：`user_nazh_owner.md`（Claude 行为调优，不属于项目协作上下文）；
`project_system_architecture.md` / `project_architecture_review_2026_04.md`
的派生信息（与 AGENTS.md 现有章节重合，搬入会噪音化）。

Signed-off-by: Niu Zhihong <zhihong@nzhnb.com>

feat(adr-0013): 恢复子图核心实施 + /simplify 清理

merge 68ab709 解决冲突时丢失的 ADR-0013 改动重写恢复，三件套全绿。
flattenSubgraphs / 子图容器渲染 / 桥接节点 SVG / passthrough 注册全部到位。

实施恢复：
- crates/nodes-flow/src/lib.rs: 加 mod passthrough + subgraphInput / subgraphOutput
  通过 NodeCapabilities::empty() 注册（PassthroughNode::from_definition 工厂）
- crates/nodes-flow/Cargo.toml: dev-dep tokio macros + rt 给 passthrough.rs 内测试
- src/registry.rs: 节点能力契约 14→16 节点 + 子图桥接 PURE 能力 expectation
- tests/workflow.rs: passthrough_nodes_forward_payload 集成测试覆盖
  native → subgraphInput → subgraphOutput 三段链路
- web/src/lib/flowgram.ts: flattenSubgraphs 递归展平 + applyParameterBindings
  {{name}} 替换 + 8 层深度上限 + 循环引用检测 + isFlattenedNode '/' 前缀过滤
- web/src/components/flowgram/nodes/shared.ts: NazhNodeKind 加 3 kinds +
  normalizeNodeKind / getFallbackNodeLabel / normalizeNodeConfig 分支 +
  NodeDefinition.buildRegistryMeta 扩 isContainer / padding / selectable 等
- web/src/components/flowgram/nodes/catalog.ts: '子图封装' 分类
- web/src/components/flowgram/flowgram-node-library.ts: 三个 def import +
  ALL_DEFS 入栈 + getAllNodeDefinitions export +
  buildSubgraphPaletteJson（拖入自带 sg-in / sg-out 桥接）+ 调色板分类
- web/src/components/FlowgramCanvas.tsx: SubCanvasRender import +
  isBusinessFlowNode / resolveNodePortColor 子图扩展 +
  FlowgramNodeCard 子图容器分支 + 桥接节点 SVG 渲染
- web/src/components/flowgram/FlowgramNodeSettingsPanel.tsx: SubgraphNodeSettings
  接入 + readNodeDraft 加 parameterBindings + buildNodeConfig 子图分支
- web/src/components/flowgram/FlowgramNodeGlyph.tsx: 三 kind glyph fallback
- web/src/components/flowgram/nodes/settings-shared.ts: SelectedNodeDraft 扩
  parameterBindings: Record<string, string | number | boolean>
- web/src/styles/flowgram.css: 子图容器 + 桥接节点 + sr-only 样式
- web/vitest.setup.ts (新): polyfill globalThis.navigator 让 FlowGram SDK 在
  environment: 'node' 下 import 期不崩溃；顺手修了 pre-existing 的
  flowgram-shortcuts.test.ts 失败
- web/vitest.config.ts: setupFiles 引入 polyfill
- web/tsconfig.json: exclude __tests__ 屏蔽 _fixture-helpers.ts 的 node:fs /
  __dirname 类型噪音（pre-existing 债，独立 tsconfig.test.json 留作 polish）

/simplify 清理：
- web/src/lib/flowgram.ts: SUBGRAPH_CONTAINER_TYPE / SUBGRAPH_INPUT_TYPE /
  SUBGRAPH_OUTPUT_TYPE / SUBGRAPH_ID_SEPARATOR 4 个 const 替换裸字面量
- extractSubgraphParameterBindings: 砍掉 data.parameterBindings 防御性
  fallback——settings panel 唯一写路径是 config.parameterBindings，单源读
- web/src/components/flowgram/nodes/settings-shared.ts: parameterBindings 类型
  由 Record<string, string> 拓宽至 string | number | boolean 与 flowgram.ts
  ParameterBindingValue 对齐（防 JSON 表单数字 / 布尔被静默 coerce）
- tests/workflow.rs: 删 4 处 narrative WHAT 注释（function name / JSON literal
  已自述）；nodes-flow/lib.rs 子图桥接注释精简

文档同步：
- docs/adr/0013-子图与宏系统.md: 状态 → 已实施（子图核心，2026-04-28）
- docs/adr/README.md: 索引行 → 已实施
- docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-28-subgraph-implementation.md: Status 行回填
  origin commits 3c04016..7b5ae43 → merge 68ab709 部分丢失 → 同日重写恢复
- AGENTS.md: ADR-0013 状态升级 + 之前的 deployment 断链 tech debt 标记为已偿还

未带回（独立 polish 工作）：
- e35cb43 loop 升级为容器（与 ADR-0013 子图核心无关）

验证：
- cargo test --workspace 全 ok（含 nodes-flow 11 内部测试 + workflow.rs
  passthrough_nodes_forward_payload 集成测试）
- cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings 干净
- cargo fmt --all -- --check exit 0
- npm run test 25 files / 224 cases 全绿
- npm run build (tsc + vite) 编译干净

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Niu Zhihong <zhihong@nzhnb.com>

docs(adr-0013): 标注子图实施 deployment 断链 + 与 PinKind 交叉点未规划

ADR-0014 Phase 2 merge 后做 ADR-0013 ↔ PinKind 交叉审视时发现 origin/main
的子图实施有 3 处部署断链——前端拖入可见但实际部署不可能：

1. web/src/lib/__tests__/flowgram-subgraph.test.ts 引用 flattenSubgraphs
   函数全仓库未定义。远端 commit 5784cd7 只 add 了 304 行 test 文件，无 impl。
2. crates/nodes-flow/src/passthrough.rs 存在但 lib.rs 既未 mod 声明也未在
   FlowPlugin::register 中注册——孤儿源文件，部署时 NodeRegistry 找不到
   passthrough 类型。
3. web/src/lib/flowgram.ts 的 toNazhWorkflowGraph 直接过滤掉 subgraph 类型
   节点（FLOWGRAM_BUSINESS_NODE_TYPES 白名单不含 subgraph），其内部 blocks
   也跟着被丢。原设计意图是先调 flattenSubgraphs 把内部节点提到顶层再过
   isBusinessNode，但 flatten 缺失。

变更范围：仅 AGENTS.md 文档警示，不修代码——ssXue 是 ADR-0013 实施 owner，
应由其修通三处断链后再标"已实施"。同步把 ADR-0013 与 PinKind 4 处未来交叉点
（subgraphInput/Output 无 PinKind 配置 / passthrough 默认 Any/Exec / flatten
保留 PinKind 义务 / 容器节点 cache 槽语义 spec gap）固化到新 memory 文件
project_subgraph_deployment_broken.md，让接续 Phase 3 PURE 节点的 session
不踩同样的雷。

Signed-off-by: Niu Zhihong <zhihong@nzhnb.com>

merge: integrate origin/main (ADR-0013 子图实施) into ADR-0014 Phase 2

本地 14 commit (ADR-0014 Phase 1 simplify + Phase 2 全量) 与远端 14 commit
(ADR-0013 子图与宏系统 + AI 编排器扩展 + CI/lock 修复) diverged，merge 而非
rebase 保留 SHA 稳定性（plan/ADR/memory 多处文档以字符串形式引用了 commit
SHA 范围）。

冲突点 4 处，全部精修：

1. AGENTS.md "Current batch of ADRs" 列表：保留我的 ADR-0014 P1+P2 升级 +
   远端新加的 ADR-0013 已实施条目；索引行从 "ADR-0013~0016/0020 proposed"
   改为 "ADR-0015/0016/0020 proposed"（0013 已不再 proposed）。

2. web/src/lib/__tests__/pin-validator.test.ts pin() helper：远端给 fixture
   补 kind: 'exec' as const（hardcode），HEAD 改成 extra?.pinKind ?? 'exec'
   （可被 PinKind 测试 override）。HEAD 是远端的严格超集，保留 HEAD——远端
   版本无法支撑 Phase 2 Task 6 新加的 4 个跨 Kind 拒连接用例。

3. web/src/lib/__tests__/pin-schema-cache.test.ts 4 处 PinDefinition 字面量：
   远端单行追加 kind: 'exec'，HEAD 多行格式（Phase 2 Task 6 顺手清债时重排）。
   语义完全等价，保留 HEAD 多行格式与文件其余部分一致。

4. web/src/lib/pin-schema-cache.ts 被 git 误判为 binary（高密度中文 UTF-8）。
   HEAD 是远端的严格超集——FALLBACK_SCHEMA 的 kind: 'exec' 修复两边独立做了
   相同的事，HEAD 还多了 resolvePinKind 函数 + getPortTooltip 的"求值语义"
   行 + Phase 1 fallback 注释。保留 HEAD。

验证：cargo test --workspace 217 tests 全绿、cargo clippy 全绿、cargo fmt
clean、pin-* 4 套前端 vitest 共 74 tests 全绿。pre-existing 失败的 4 个
前端 test files 是 origin/main 自身的 jsdom 环境问题，本 merge 未引入新失败。

Signed-off-by: Niu Zhihong <zhihong@nzhnb.com>

refactor: ADR-0014 Phase 2 /simplify reviewer fixes

3 个 reviewer agent（reuse / quality / efficiency）并行审 Phase 2 全量
12 commit 后给出的 actionable findings：

quality I-1：web/e2e/pin-kind-modbus.spec.ts PinType allowlist 含
  'number' / 'bytes' 这两个 PinType 中根本不存在的变体（实际是
  integer / float / binary）。今天侥幸通过因 modbusRead 永远 emit
  'json'；但 regression 输出 integer 会假阴性，重构改回 'number' 会
  假阳性。改成与 web/src/generated/PinType.ts 对齐的真实枚举集。

quality I-2：WorkflowDeployment::output_cache(node_id) 之前返回
  Option<&Arc<OutputCache>> 强迫调用方写 cache.clone() 或不能 outlive
  借用范围（未来 IPC handler 必踩）。改返回 Option<Arc<OutputCache>>，
  内部 .map(Arc::clone)——一次 refcount bump 比强迫调用方写 clone 划算。
  doc 加段说明 "返回 owned Arc"。tests/pin_kind_phase2.rs 调用 .read
  通过 Arc deref 自动适配，无需改测试。

quality I-3：facade src/lib.rs 没重导出 OutputCache / CachedOutput /
  PinKind，强迫 src-tauri / 集成测试 / 第三方插件直接 import nazh_core
  访问这些 Ring 0 类型，破坏 facade 单一入口约定。补到 pub use 块。

reuse R-1：pin-compat.test.ts 与 pin-kind-compat.test.ts 共享 ~25 行
  fs/path/parseJsonc 加载逻辑（fixture 路径 4 层向上 + 非空守卫）。
  抽 web/src/lib/__tests__/_fixture-helpers.ts，两 spec 各精简到
  `loadJsoncFixture(fixturePath(__dirname, '*.jsonc'))` 一行。文件名前
  下划线遵循"测试 helper 不是公开 API"的命名约定。

efficiency 全清，无修复——hot path 都是 O(1) 或 deploy-time once-shot。

不修：reviewer 的 Minor 包括 --accent-cool CSS 变量未在 theme tokens
中定义（Phase 5 视觉打磨自然处理）、resolvePinTypeKind 与 resolvePinKind
名字易混（同 Phase 5）、getLogicNodeBranchDefinitions 已不止 logic
节点用（rename 同 Phase 5）。

Signed-off-by: Niu Zhihong <zhihong@nzhnb.com>

docs(adr-0014): Phase 2 落地后状态同步 + AGENTS / memory 更新

ADR-0014 Phase 2 Task 9 收尾。Phase 2 共 11 个 commit（a799469..4419f65）
完成"第一个真实 Data 引脚 + 前端跨 Kind 闸门 + 画布双端口渲染"全链路：

- ADR-0014 实施进度：状态升 Phase 1 + Phase 2，加 Phase 2 详细变更项（后端
  / 跨语言契约 / 前端 / 画布 / 顺手清债 五块）。
- crates/nodes-io/AGENTS.md：modbusRead 节点表更新为 out (Json/Exec) +
  latest (Json/Data) 双输出；pin 声明同步纪律加一条"声明 PinKind::Data 输出
  时需同步前端 useDynamicPort 配置 + getLogicNodeBranchDefinitions 分支"。
- 根 AGENTS.md（CLAUDE.md 软链）："Current batch of ADRs" 中 ADR-0014 升 P1+P2，
  "ADR Execution Order" 第 8 项同步。
- Phase 2 plan 加 merged status 标头。

memory 文件由 session 同步更新：
- MEMORY.md：ADR-0014 状态升 P1+P2，加 E2E IPC 限制条目。
- project_system_architecture.md：Phase 2 完整变更列表入档。
- project_architecture_review_2026_04.md：提案-07 状态升 P1+P2。
- 新增 project_e2e_tauri_browser_mode.md：记录 Playwright 跑在 Chromium
  而非 Tauri webview 的项目级限制（Task 8 实施时发现），影响未来需 IPC
  真值的 E2E 设计选型。

Signed-off-by: Niu Zhihong <zhihong@nzhnb.com>

test(e2e): ADR-0014 Phase 2 Task 8 modbusRead 双引脚 DOM 烟雾测试

Task 7 把 modbusRead 加入 useDynamicPort 族后，端口 DOM 应该写出
data-port-id="out" / data-port-id="latest" + data-port-pin-kind /
data-port-pin-type 属性。本 spec 在真实运行环境断言这套 wiring 真的
渲染到 DOM——证明 JSX 中 resolvePinKind / resolvePinTypeKind 的
返回值确实写到了 React 渲染树。

实现路径：Path A（UI flow，无侵入）。
  - `board-create` 创建的新工程默认模板（projects.ts:717
    buildStarterWorkflow）只含 timer + debugConsole，没有 modbusRead。
  - 改用 FlowgramNodeAddPanel 的"Modbus Read"卡片双击路径
    （onDoubleClick → handleInsertNode → createWorkflowNodeByType）
    插入节点，绕开 FlowGram 画布拖拽。
  - 面板 is-hover-reveal 类只有鼠标进入左侧触发区才挂载，未挂载时
    被画布遮盖，物理 dblclick 会落到画布。改用 dispatchEvent('dblclick')
    直接对按钮派发合成事件，React onDoubleClick 经事件委托捕获。

属性取值断言放宽到"存在 + 在合法枚举集合内"：
  - Playwright `webServer` 启动 Tauri dev，但 Playwright 仍以 HTTP
    浏览器方式连 1420 端口——hasTauriRuntime() 为 false，IPC
    describe_node_pins 不可达，pin-schema-cache 一律走 fallback
    Any/Any/exec。
  - 具体值（latest=data、out=exec）由 Vitest（pin-schema-cache.test.ts）
    + Rust 集成测试（Phase 2 Task 4）两层守住。E2E 这里仅证明
    attribute 真写到 DOM 上、port id 正确。

范围限定：
- 仅断言 DOM presence + attribute 取值（值在合法枚举内）
- 不做 Playwright 画布拖拽（SVG + portal 的画布拖拽脆弱性已知；跨
  Kind 拒连接的逻辑断言由 Vitest pin-validator.test.ts 守护）
- 视觉外观由用户手动验证 + Phase 5 视觉打磨阶段统一收口

测试运行：本地 `npm --prefix web run test:e2e -- pin-kind-modbus`
全部通过（5.8s 单测 + 15.3s 含 webServer 启动）。

feat(web): FlowGram 引脚 PinKind 视觉区分 + modbusRead 双端口渲染

ADR-0014 Phase 2 Task 7。modbusRead 之前只渲染单输出端口（FlowGram
默认），latest Data 引脚对用户不可见、Task 6 的连接期校验也无从触发。

变更：

- nodes/shared.ts: getLogicNodeBranchDefinitions 加 modbusRead 分支，
  返回 out + latest 两端口（portId 受控，匹配 Rust 端 pin id）。函数
  doc 同步更新——历史名 logic / branch 仍保留以避免大改名爆 diff，
  Phase 5 视觉打磨再统一收口。
- nodes/modbusRead/index.ts: buildRegistryMeta 加 useDynamicPort: true
  + defaultPorts: [{ type: 'input' }]，让 modbusRead 加入 if/switch
  /loop/tryCatch 既有的"动态端口"族。
- pin-schema-cache.ts: 新增 resolvePinKind(nodeId, portId, direction)
  与 resolvePinTypeKind 平级，回退 "exec"（与存量节点 Exec 分布一致）；
  getPortTooltip 加"求值语义"行。
- FlowgramCanvas.tsx: branch 端口 DOM 加 data-port-pin-kind attribute
  喂给 CSS 选择器；import 同步加 resolvePinKind。
- styles/flowgram.css: data-port-pin-kind='data' 选择器加空心 + 冷色
  边框，与 Exec 实心外观区分。Kind 与 Type 正交，选择器单独成块不与
  data-port-pin-type 组合。视觉细节 Phase 5 视觉打磨再统一收口。
- __tests__/pin-schema-cache.test.ts: 新增 resolvePinKind /
  resolvePinTypeKind / getPortTooltip 求值语义共 8 个 case。

实质性效果：
1. modbusRead 节点显示两个输出端口（out 实心 / latest 空心冷色）。
2. 用户尝试把 latest（Data）拖到普通 Exec 输入引脚时，pin-validator
   立即报"连接不兼容（求值语义不同）"——Task 6 拦截真正生效。
3. 端口 hover tooltip 多一行"求值语义：Data（拉取式）"/"Exec（推送式）"。

不变：现有 if/switch/loop/tryCatch 节点 PinKind 全为 Exec，加新 attribute
不影响视觉（CSS 默认即 Exec 既有外观）。

docs(graph): output_cache 字段与访问器的 None 语义说明收紧

代码 reviewer 在 Task 3 后补审验时发现两处文档缺陷：

1. WorkflowDeployment.output_caches 字段注释 + output_cache(node_id) 访问器
   doc 都说"仅声明 PinKind::Data 输出引脚的节点会有非空缓存槽"。
   表述本身正确（slots 维度），但易被读为"HashMap 条目只在 Data 节点存在"
   ——deploy.rs:172-187 实际上为图中每个节点都插入了 OutputCache 条目，
   只是 Exec-only 节点的 slots 为空。访问器返回 None 仅意味着节点 id
   不在该工作流中，不是"节点无 Data 引脚"。tighten 文案让 None 语义
   与"节点不存在"唯一对应，避免未来 IPC 误解。

2. src-tauri 的 output_caches: _ 占位注释引用了 "Phase 5 IPC"，但 spec §九
   定义 Phase 5 = 视觉打磨（不涉 IPC）。改为 phase-agnostic："后续 IPC
   待立项"。1dc9d3b commit 信息体的相同误称无法在历史中改写，本 commit
   作为口径更正。

Signed-off-by: Niu Zhihong <zhihong@nzhnb.com>

单路径 Exec push，行为不变。全量 cargo test --workspace 通过。

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix item_request_proxy handling and split apply pipeline (1.2.3)

- Read proxy.insert_plan (per-slot) instead of proxy.item_requests (flat)
  and pass return_item_request_proxy=true so the proxy is actually
  returned — modules/ammo/fuel/filters now land in the correct
  inventory slot on multi-inventory entities (assemblers, recyclers).
- Wrap blueprint application in pcall so the temp inventory always gets
  destroyed.
- Extract the pipeline into apply_blueprint.lua; add blueprint-book
  support via collect_pages.
- Prefix generated platform names with "LSS " and migrate existing
  saves on_configuration_changed.
- Collapse per-ship success prints into a single summary line; keep
  per-ship failure prints tagged with the ship name.
- Refresh shop-ship, white-science and calcite-cruiser blueprints to
  SA蓝图合集-undertow-26.4.9 versions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Optimize seeding hot loops, harden pipeline, dict-based blueprints (1.2.1)

- Wrap each pipeline stage in pcall so a failure no longer aborts on_init.
- Disable build smoke + event raise on bulk ore/tree/fluid create_entity.
- Skip tile correction and entity collision pass in the 448x448 repaint.
- Cache Gleba tree prototype lookup once instead of per planted tile.
- Switch blueprints to dict keyed by lowercase surface name (O(1) lookup).
- Unify clean_area interval convention to half-open.
- Drop dead prototype guards in spawn_spider and tree maturity helpers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Refactor into stage pipeline, fix blueprint insert plan + Gleba trees (1.2.0)

Restructure into a clean_area -> place_resources -> apply_blueprint -> spawn_spider
pipeline driven by a single planets.lua config table. Rename area_cleaner,
generate_resources, legendary_spider, blueprint modules to verb-first names.

Bugs fixed:
- Fluid source amount overflowed uint32 (8192*1024*512 = 2^32); clamped to
  0xFFFFFFFF so oil wells / geysers / vents / brines no longer seed empty.
- Blueprint module / filter / ammo requests did not land in revived entities
  on Factorio 2.0. The old code iterated LuaEntity::item_requests (flat
  {name, quality, count} view) but parsed it as BlueprintInsertPlan, so
  plan.id was always nil and nothing was inserted. apply_blueprint now reads
  LuaEntity::insert_plan (the per-slot BlueprintInsertPlan array) and calls
  revive with return_item_request_proxy = true. Productivity modules inside
  recycler blueprints now correctly land in the module slot.
- AABB in apply_blueprint now transforms blueprint-local coordinates to
  surface coordinates via anchor + direction.
- Redundant manual set_tiles and resource/cliff second-pass removed.
- Vulcanus Demolisher scan switched to ring chunk generation (~70% cheaper).
- Spider spawn retries find_non_colliding_position at radii 128, 256, 512
  before falling back to origin.
- Locale key mismatch between info.json name and locale cfg fixed.

Features added:
- Nauvis and Gleba enemy cleanup (256-tile expand ring) sweeps spawners,
  worms, and pentapod nests beyond the landing zone.
- Gleba overgrowth soil bands are pre-planted with mature yumako trees and
  jellystem trees (~50% density). tick_grown = game.tick makes them
  immediately harvestable.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Rewrite starter flow with auto-packer, personal/team split, and map-spawn chest cache (1.2.0)

Replaces the hand-coded equipment-grid coordinates with a first-fit
packer driven by a prioritised (name, count) wishlist, splits the
starter inventory into a per-player personal pack and a one-time team
resource cache that is deposited into legendary steel chests anchored
to LuaForce::get_spawn_position (so BestLanding's landing blueprint
cannot push the chests out of view), and refreshes README, CLAUDE.md,
locale, and changelog to match.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Added WSL/Windows environment note and Lua syntax-check hint to CLAUDE.md.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Ignore .vscode/settings.json

FactorioModDebug writes user-specific absolute paths into this file, so
it should not be tracked. Matches the existing pattern in LegendaryShipStart
and BestLanding.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add per-planet blueprints, fix chunk-gen batching, clean up (1.1.4)

Feature:
- Added starter blueprints for Nauvis, Vulcanus, Fulgora, Gleba, and Aquilo.
  Blueprints are matched to the surface by case-insensitive name.
- Added Vulcanus Demolisher (segmented-unit) purge in a 300-tile ring
  around the landing area; their territories reach beyond the cleared
  square so body-inside-area filtering alone is not enough.

Bug fixes:
- force_generate_chunk_requests() was called inside the chunk-request loop,
  turning a single batched generation into O(n*m) synchronous waits (roughly
  196 blocking calls for the 448x448 landing square). Moved the synchronous
  wait to after the full request batch.

Cleanup:
- Removed unused added_items debug list in legendary_spider's
  add_items_to_inventory; it was built but never read.
- Dropped .x-or-[1] dual-access fallback in area_cleaner; no caller ever
  used index-style tables and operator precedence made the -1 adjustment
  in the fallback path never fire anyway.
- Replaced the dead ((i-1) % #resources) + 1 in generate_resources_pattern
  with plain ipairs.

Docs:
- Rewrote README in English only.
- Added CLAUDE.md with the four-step landing pipeline, Vulcanus caveat,
  blueprint-apply details, and Factorio API references.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add biter_egg ship, clean up dead code and docs (1.2.0)

- Added biter_egg as a new entry in the starter fleet.
- Removed dead storage.pending_platforms branch in CreateSingleShip; there
  was no on_surface_created consumer, so stored platform indices were
  never drained. Missing surface now just logs and skips.
- Rewrote README in English only.
- Added CLAUDE.md documenting the blueprint-apply pipeline (import_stack,
  force_generate_chunks, set_tiles, build_blueprint + revive with
  item_request_proxy), state model, and Factorio API references.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Clean up dead code and docs (1.1.2)

- Removed unused added_items debug list from give_legendary_items; the
  string list was built but never read.
- Rewrote README in English only (bilingual entries dropped).
- Added CLAUDE.md with architecture notes, equipment-grid layout caveats,
  Factorio API references, and the project's code/doc language conventions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Refactor into dependency-only meta-pack (2.0.0)

Removed all Lua code and README asset images. The mod now exists purely
as a dependency container that pulls in LegendaryMechStart, LegendaryShipStart,
and BestLanding, plus a curated set of optional community mods.

- Deleted control.lua, data*.lua, settings.lua, utils.lua, chunk_utils.lua,
  area_cleaner.lua, generate_resources.lua, legendary_items.lua.
- info.json: added hard deps on the three startup mods; English-only description.
- Rewrote README in English; added CLAUDE.md (Chinese) describing the
  meta-pack role and language conventions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

data.content: Ah, the classic "fix" commit extravaganza—24 out of 48 commits, like a soap opera where every episode needs a "fix" title. It seems you’ve discovered a golden age of refactoring, but maybe next time, you could aim for some actual *new* features instead of just reskinning the same old cat. And just a friendly suggestion: if your PRs get any smaller, I might mistakingly think they’re just very confused commit messages trying to hide in plain sight.

data.issueTitle: Add TLBI (TLB Invalidate) instruction wrappers with typed operands
data.body:
> As per https://github.com/rust-embedded/wg/blob/master/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md#ai-tool-use-policy, please can you confirm that as the author you have reviewed and tested this contribution before submission and that you understand the contents of your submission?

I confirm that I have reviewed the content. AI participated in the design discussions, but I made the final decisions and manually verified the code.

Verified assembly output on [godbolt](https://godbolt.org/z/sa996Wz3d)
QEMU tests via [SimpleKernel](https://github.com/MRNIU/SimpleKernel/commit/a9cc61632)

data.message:
feat: rename Top Repositories to Recent, show 8 from last 3 months

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: remove 21 mock events from 2026-03 data

Remove 17 fake commits (short 8-char SHAs like d9f3e221, a3f7c912)
and 4 old mock AI roasts (ai_roast-03xx IDs) that were demo data.
Rebuild index.json with correct stats.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: truncate commit messages to first line in client-side renderer

The SSR CommitNode.astro correctly used firstLine, but the client-side
renderEventCard() displayed the full multi-line message. Now consistent.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: TopRepos uses real per-repo counts, first month loaded dynamically

- Add repoBreakdown field to MonthSummary with actual event counts per repo
- TopRepos component reads repoBreakdown instead of dividing evenly
- index.astro loads the latest month dynamically instead of hardcoding 2026-03

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: backfill 139 weekly AI roasts across all historical data

Generated locally via Claude, covering 2017-11 through 2026-02.
Each roast references specific patterns from that week's activity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: add circuit breakers for AI roast API calls

- Stop immediately on 403 (budget/auth exhausted)
- Wait 60s on 429 then resume
- Stop after 3 consecutive unknown failures
- Always delay between requests, not just after success

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: use correct GitHub Models endpoint and add rate limit handling

- Base URL: models.github.ai/inference (not models.inference.ai.azure.com)
- Model name: openai/gpt-4o-mini (vendor prefix required)
- Add 5s delay between AI roast requests to stay under 15/min limit
- On 429, wait 60s before continuing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: correct GitHub Models base URL (no /v1 prefix)

GitHub Models endpoint is https://models.inference.ai.azure.com,
not /v1. The code appends /chat/completions, so /v1 caused 404.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: add models:read permission for GitHub Models API access

GITHUB_TOKEN needs the models permission to call the GitHub Models
inference endpoint. Without it AI roast generation fails with 401.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: add actions:write permission to fetch-data workflow

GITHUB_TOKEN needs actions:write to trigger deploy.yml via
gh workflow run. Without it the dispatch call returns HTTP 403.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
